TypeSignature.Value: .class public auto ansi beforefieldinit SKMaskFilter extends SkiaSharp.SKObject

Docs.summary: Mask filters perform transformations on an alpha-channel mask before drawing. A mask filter is set using the property on type.

MemberSignature.Value: public static float ConvertRadiusToSigma (float radius);
.method public static hidebysig float32 ConvertRadiusToSigma(float32 radius) cil managed

Docs.summary: Converts from the (legacy) idea of specifying the blur "radius" to the standard notion of specifying its sigma.

MemberSignature.Value: public static float ConvertSigmaToRadius (float sigma);
.method public static hidebysig float32 ConvertSigmaToRadius(float32 sigma) cil managed

Docs.summary: Converts from the standard notion of specifying the blur sigma to the (legacy) idea of specifying its "radius".

MemberSignature.Value: public static SkiaSharp.SKMaskFilter CreateBlur (SkiaSharp.SKBlurStyle blurStyle, float sigma);
.method public static hidebysig class SkiaSharp.SKMaskFilter CreateBlur(valuetype SkiaSharp.SKBlurStyle blurStyle, float32 sigma) cil managed

Docs.param: The standard deviation (greater than 0) of the Gaussian blur to apply.
Docs.summary: Creates a mask filter that applies a blur.
Docs.returns: Returns the new , or on error.

MemberSignature.Value: public static SkiaSharp.SKMaskFilter CreateBlur (SkiaSharp.SKBlurStyle blurStyle, float sigma, bool respectCTM);
.method public static hidebysig class SkiaSharp.SKMaskFilter CreateBlur(valuetype SkiaSharp.SKBlurStyle blurStyle, float32 sigma, bool respectCTM) cil managed

Docs.param: The standard deviation (greater than 0) of the Gaussian blur to apply.
to modify the blur's sigma by the current transformation matrix (CTM); otherwise, .
Docs.summary: Creates a mask filter that applies a blur.
Docs.returns: Returns the new , or on error.

MemberSignature.Value: public static SkiaSharp.SKMaskFilter CreateClip (byte min, byte max);
.method public static hidebysig class SkiaSharp.SKMaskFilter CreateClip(unsigned int8 min, unsigned int8 max) cil managed

Docs.summary: Creates a mask filter that clips the alpha channel to the specified minimum and maximum alpha values.
Docs.returns: Returns the new , or on error.

MemberSignature.Value: public static SkiaSharp.SKMaskFilter CreateGamma (float gamma);
.method public static hidebysig class SkiaSharp.SKMaskFilter CreateGamma(float32 gamma) cil managed

Docs.summary: Creates a mask filter that applies gamma.
Docs.returns: Returns the new , or on error.

MemberSignature.Value: public static SkiaSharp.SKMaskFilter CreateShader (SkiaSharp.SKShader shader);
.method public static hidebysig class SkiaSharp.SKMaskFilter CreateShader(class SkiaSharp.SKShader shader) cil managed

Docs.param: The shader that defines the mask. Must not be .
Docs.summary: Creates a mask filter that uses an to define the mask shape.
Docs.returns: A new backed by the specified shader.

MemberSignature.Value: public static SkiaSharp.SKMaskFilter CreateTable (byte[] table);
.method public static hidebysig class SkiaSharp.SKMaskFilter CreateTable(unsigned int8[] table) cil managed

Docs.param: The lookup table with exactly 256 elements.
Docs.summary: Creates a mask filter that applies a table lookup on each of the alpha values in the mask.
Docs.returns: Returns the new , or on error.

MemberSignature.Value: protected override void Dispose (bool disposing);
.method familyhidebysig virtual instance void Dispose(bool disposing) cil managed

Docs.param: to release both managed and unmanaged resources; to release only unmanaged resources.
Docs.summary: Releases the unmanaged resources used by the and optionally releases the managed resources.
Docs.remarks: Always dispose the object before you release your last reference to the . Otherwise, the resources it is using will not be freed until the garbage collector calls the finalizer.

MemberSignature.Value: public const int TableMaxLength = 256;
.field public static literal int32 TableMaxLength = (256)

Docs.summary: Gets the maximum number of colors in the color lookup table.
